stemHtml:
In an aircraft equipped with Fly-By-Wire flight controls and sidesticks for both the Captain and the First Officer, which of the following statements are correct/incorrect?

1. If the Captain moves their sidestick to the left and the First Officer moves their sidestick to the right, the Captain’s input will have priority and the aircraft will bank left
2. If both pilots simultaneously deflect their sidesticks fully aft, the resulting control surface deflection is limited to the maximum deflection allowable by one sidestick
